title: Topsoe is Selected Technology Provider by Indian Frontrunner in Green Ammonia, Hygenco
content: Hygenco has partnered with Topsoe to deliver advanced green ammonia technology for its 750 tons-per-day green ammonia plant in Gopalpur, Odisha, India, set to begin operation by 2027. Topsoe will provide its dynamic ammonia synthesis technology, engineering design, and proprietary hardware to enable efficient green hydrogen-to-ammonia conversion. The plant, part of Tata Steel's industrial park, aims to export green ammonia to Europe, aligning with EU RFNBO regulations. This project supports decarbonization goals by leveraging ammonia's role as a hydrogen carrier and in decarbonizing industries like steel and cement.
author: Analysts Account
